title: Razorpay UPI Response Config
description: Runtime handler configuration returned in checkout responses for the UPI Intent flow. The business MUST create a Razorpay Order before responding and include the resulting razorpay_order_id here. This config provides everything the platform needs to initiate the UPI Intent payment via the Razorpay SDK.

environment.description: Razorpay API environment for this checkout.

key_id.description: Razorpay public API key for SDK initialization.

razorpay_order_id.description: Razorpay Order ID created by the business for this checkout (e.g., order_Abcdef1234). Acts as the binding identifier — the payment credential MUST reference this order ID, and the business MUST verify the match during processing to prevent replay attacks.

merchant_name.description: Business display name shown to the buyer during UPI payment.
